description: Schema for extracting key information from an invoice document.

issue_date.description: The date when the invoice was issued, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

due_date.description: The date when the invoice payment is due, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vendor.description: Details about the vendor or service provider.

address.description: The full mailing address of the vendor, potentially multi-line.

email.description: The billing email address of the vendor.

customer.description: Details about the customer or recipient of the invoice (Bill To).

address.description: The full mailing address of the customer, potentially multi-line.

line_items.description: A list of individual items or services billed in the invoice.

description.description: A description of the item or service.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

unit_price.description: The price per unit of the item or service.

amount.description: The total amount for this line item (quantity * unit price).

subtotal.description: The sum of all line item amounts before taxes and discounts.

tax.description: The total tax amount applied to the invoice.

grand_total.description: The final total amount due for the invoice, including subtotal and tax.

payment_terms.description: The payment terms specified on the invoice (e.g., 'Net 30').
